## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — Code refactoring (no bug fix, no feature)
- [ ] `perf` — Performance improvement
- [ ] `test` — Adding or updating tests
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] `build` — Build system or dependency changes
- [ ] `ci` — CI configuration changes
- [ ] `chore` — Maintenance task

## Related Issue

Closes #<!-- issue number -->

## Context

<!-- Why is this change needed? What problem does it solve? -->

## Changes

<!-- Summary of what was changed and why. No raw diff. -->

- 
- 

## Checklist

- [ ] My branch is named `feature/…` or `bugfix/…`
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) with the correct scope (`svg-core`, `svg-react`, `storybook`, or `svg-tools`)
- [ ] Tests are in `tests/` and use `renderSuspense` where Suspense is involved
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run test` passes
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed (README, JSDoc, Storybook story)

## Additional Notes

<!-- Breaking changes, security considerations, migration steps, or "None" -->
